name: Quit job while on work restrictions after injury in West Valley City, mistake?

mainEntity.name: Quit job while on work restrictions after injury in West Valley City, mistake?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, risks benefit cut—Idaho/Utah expect mitigation.** Don't quit under restrictions[5]. **Key factors:** Job not guaranteed post-injury. **Practical guidance:** Seek light duty, document refusals. Resume search carefully. **Stay employed preserves pay.**
